narrative:
Huntington Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 927 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
